title: (Bearish Signal) MOH, RSI Indicator left the overbought zone on April 26, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that MOH's price could be shifting from an uptrend to a downtrend. Traders may consider selling the stock or exploring put options. A.I.dvisor looked back and found 39 similar cases where MOH's RSI Indicator left the overbought zone, and in 33 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 85%. Current price $248.61 crossed the resistance line at $249.36 and is trading between $249.36 resistance and $245.71 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 03/24/21 - 04/26/21, the price experienced a +8% Uptrend, while the week of 04/19/21 - 04/26/21 shows a -0.45% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/8zfgd738qqv61.png?width=1524&format=png&auto=webp&s=37a4528cab76409dbbd111d14afc2b2a2b693166

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator demonstrated that the ticker has stayed in the overbought zone for 9 days. The longer the ticker stays in the overbought zone, the sooner a price pull-back is expected.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where MOH declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 65%.

MOH broke above its upper Bollinger Band on April 19, 2021. This could be a sign that the stock is set to drop as the stock moves back below the upper band and toward the middle band. You may want to consider selling the stock or exploring put options.

[Full information about signal](https://tickeron.com/news/10803676-molina-healthcare-moh-253-53-rsi-indicator-left-the-overbought-zone-on-april-26-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
